mechanism_narrative: Rising real GDP growth expands corporate earnings expectations, directly boosting equity valuations over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in expansion periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: Rapid monetary tightening compresses equity multiples by raising the discount rate, causing immediate negative forward returns.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day returns in >60% of triggered instances despite the rate hike threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll growth combined with stable unemployment indicates a healthy labor market that sustains consumer demand, driving positive equity returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: Joint signal predicts positive returns but SPX underperforms baseline in >50% of cases over a 60-day window.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production above trend signals robust manufacturing capacity utilization, which historically precedes positive equity returns during supply-led recoveries.
failure_condition: Signal fails to predict positive returns when INDPRO exceeds threshold in stagflationary environments.

mechanism_narrative: Rising retail sales and food services revenue reflect accelerating consumer spending, which directly lifts forward equity returns over a one-week horizon.
failure_condition: Rolling correlation between RSAFS changes and 5d SPX returns remains near zero across all sample periods.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid deterioration in the unemployment rate signals an impending economic slowdown, prompting equity de-rating over the subsequent quarter.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in >60% of triggered instances despite rising unemployment.

mechanism_narrative: Declining housing starts coinciding with elevated inflation compresses real disposable income and signals demand destruction, leading to negative equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Joint signal predicts negative returns but SPX outperforms in >55% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: In a high-inflation regime, sustained elevated federal funds rates increase the cost of capital and suppress equity valuations over a quarterly horizon.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns are not significantly negative when FEDFUNDS remains above 5% and CPIAUCSL exceeds 305.
